thesis: Twenty-five eligible names and the reputation signal is enormous, but two things demand discipline. Seven accounts sit at edge EXACTLY 0.450 (a flat 95% win rate) across sample sizes from 7,310 to 86,026 bets — a scoring ceiling, not skill — so that cluster is discounted. Anchor instead on high-volume sharps with credible varied edge: 0x1f2d (0.217 over 153,222 bets, +$16.6M), 0xd235 (0.193 / 81,103), 0x94f1 (0.284 / 40,172). Decisive: the only venue settle-able from Arc is Azuro, and all 8 of its markets closed Dec 2024–Mar 2025. The live tradeable edges (Polymarket: US-Iran peace 0.355, BTC $150k 0.014, World Cup longshots ~0.01) are signal-only. Correct action: deploy ZERO, reserve the full book, flag that a fresh Azuro feed is required. The discipline not to act on a degraded execution surface IS the decision.

decisions.reasoning: Rank #1, but edge pinned at exactly 0.450 (95% win rate) over 86,026 bets — a score-ceiling artifact, not provable edge. Discounted.
The most credible sharp (edge 0.217 over 153,222 bets, +$16.6M) and I would back it — but every Azuro market closed months ago. No valid market to execute into; reserving.
Credible high-volume sharp (0.193 / 81,103). Same blocker: Azuro's book is settled fixtures — nothing live to copy into.
Strong varied edge (0.284 / 40,172) — a prime copy candidate if a live Azuro market existed. None does this cycle.
The only non-Polymarket sharp (Overtime, 0.102 / 716), but Overtime is signal-only and Azuro has no live market — nothing executable.
Another member of the flat-0.450 (95%) cluster — discounted as a scoring artifact.
